MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Tiffany Viveros, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ronald Curry, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Aluma Systems USA, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on April 13, 2007.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on Novenber 13, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ronald Curry and against the Defaulted Defendant Aluma Systems USA, Inc., as follows:

Economic Damages - $50,000.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $300,000.00.
Total - $350,000.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
